Rarity: RARE minmax Jewel Cobalt Jewel Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}PercentIncreasedLifeJewel Prefix: {range:0.952}PercentIncreasedManaJewel Suffix: {range:0.5}DamageJewel Suffix: {range:1}CastSpeedJewel LevelReq: 0 Implicits: 0 9% increased Damage 4% increased Cast Speed 7% increased maximum Life 10% increased maximum Mana

Rarity: UNIQUE Ancestral Vision Viridian Jewel Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 {range:1}+(5-10) to Dexterity Modifiers to Chance to Suppress Spell Damage also apply to Chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments at 50% of their Value

Rarity: RARE minmax wand Profane Wand Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.451}IncreasedManaWeapon12 Prefix: {range:0.676}SpellDamageOnWeapon7 Prefix: {range:0.384}SpellDamageAndManaOnWeapon7 Suffix: None Suffix: None Suffix: None CatalystQuality: 20 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Quality does not increase Physical Damage {crafted}Grants 1% increased Elemental Damage per 2% Quality {tags:caster,speed}14% increased Cast Speed 131% increased Spell Damage +192 to maximum Mana {tags:unveiled_mod,damage}{crafted}{range:0.5}(4-5)% chance to deal Double Damage {tags:unveiled_mod,caster,speed}{custom}{range:0.5}(18-22)% increased Cast Speed {tags:unveiled_mod,caster,speed}{custom}15% chance to gain Arcane Surge when you Kill an Enemy

Rarity: RARE minmax Helmet Deicide Mask Evasion: 263 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Energy Shield: 65 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Crafted: true Prefix: None Prefix: {range:0.479}IncreasedMana11 Prefix: {range:0.436}IncreasedLife9 Suffix: {range:0.788}ChanceToSuppressSpells5__ Suffix: {range:0.335}Dexterity9 Suffix: {range:0.239}FireResist8 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B-B LevelReq: 68 Implicits: 2 {tags:physical,elemental,cold}{eater}8% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Cold Damage {tags:caster,speed}{exarch}8% increased Cast Speed +14% chance to Suppress Spell Damage +52 to Dexterity +136 to maximum Life +66 to maximum Mana +46% to Fire Resistance {tags:unveiled_mod,gem}{crafted}+1 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems {tags:unveiled_mod,gem}{crafted}{range:0.5}(8-10)% increased Area of Effect

Rarity: RARE minmax chest Necrotic Armour Evasion: 3361 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Energy Shield: 706 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.211}LocalBaseEvasionRatingAndEnergyShield8___ Prefix: {range:0.296}LocalIncreasedEvasionAndEnergyShield8 Prefix: {range:0.303}LocalIncreasedEvasionAndEnergyShieldAndStunRecovery6 Suffix: {range:1}ChanceToSuppressSpellsHigh5___ Suffix: {range:0.408}ChaosResist6 Suffix: None Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G-G-G LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 {tags:resistance}{exarch}+2% to all maximum Resistances {tags:physical,elemental,cold}{eater}11% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Cold Damage +22% chance to Suppress Spell Damage +317 to Evasion Rating 144% increased Evasion and Energy Shield +74 to maximum Energy Shield +33% to Chaos Resistance 16% increased Stun and Block Recovery {tags:unveiled_mod,elemental,fire,chaos,resistance}{crafted}{range:1}+(13-15)% to Fire and Chaos Resistances

Rarity: UNIQUE Algor Mortis Carnal Mitts Evasion: 121 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Energy Shield: 97 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 League: Delirium CatalystQuality: 20 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G LevelReq: 50 Implicits: 1 {tags:resource,life}{range:0.5}(4-6)% increased maximum Life {range:0.5}+(50-70) to maximum Energy Shield {range:0.5}+(15-20)% to Cold and Lightning Resistances {range:0.5}(20-30)% chance to Sap Enemies in Chilling Areas {range:1}Enemies in your Chilling Areas take (25-35)% increased Lightning Damage {range:1}(15-20)% increased Effect of Non-Damaging Ailments Corrupted

Rarity: RARE New Item Velour Boots Evasion: 496 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.556}IncreasedLife8 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.5}ChanceToSuppressSpells3 Suffix: {range:0.761}LightningResist7 Suffix: None Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 {exarch}5% increased Action Speed {tags:elemental,fire,cold,lightning,ailment}{eater}{range:0.5}(18-20)% chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments +10% chance to Suppress Spell Damage +123 to maximum Life +44% to Lightning Resistance {tags:elemental,fire,cold,lightning,ailment}{custom}{range:0.5}(31-35)% chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments {tags:unveiled_mod,speed}{custom}{range:0.5}(25-30)% increased Movement Speed {tags:unveiled_mod,speed}{custom}{range:0.5}(10-12)% increased Movement Speed if you haven't been Hit Recently {tags:resource,mana}{crafted}{range:1}+(45-54) to maximum Mana

Rarity: RARE minmax Ring Amethyst Ring Crusader Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.295}IncreasedLife7 Prefix: {range:0.25}SpellDamageRingInfluence3__ Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.535}ChaosResist6 Suffix: {range:0.736}IncreasedCastSpeed3 Suffix: {range:0.296}ColdResist8 Catalyst: Prismatic CatalystQuality: 20 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 1 {tags:chaos,resistance}{range:0.5}+(17-23)% to Chaos Resistance 23% increased Spell Damage 15% increased Cast Speed +104 to maximum Life +56% to Cold Resistance +39% to Chaos Resistance {tags:resource,unveiled_mod,mana}{crafted}{range:0.5}+(36-40) to maximum Mana {tags:resource,unveiled_mod,mana}{crafted}5% reduced Mana Cost of Skills

Rarity: RARE minmax Life Ring Vermillion Ring Crusader Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.62}IncreasedLife6 Prefix: {range:0.218}SpellDamageRingInfluence3__ Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.62}IncreasedCastSpeed3 Suffix: {range:0.43}Dexterity9 Suffix: {range:0.331}AllResistances5 Catalyst: Fertile CatalystQuality: 20 LevelReq: 80 Implicits: 1 {tags:resource,life}{range:1}(5-7)% increased maximum Life +53 to Dexterity 23% increased Spell Damage 15% increased Cast Speed +112 to maximum Life +15% to all Elemental Resistances {tags:resource,unveiled_mod,mana}{custom}{range:0.5}+(51-55) to maximum Mana {tags:resource,unveiled_mod,mana}{custom}{range:0.5}(6-7)% reduced Mana Cost of Skills

Rarity: RARE minmax belt Stygian Vise Hunter Item Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.718}IncreasedLife9 Prefix: {range:0.186}IncreasedMana11 Prefix: {range:0.5}MaximumLifeInfluence2 Suffix: {range:0.965}ChaosResist5 Suffix: {range:0.141}FireResist7 Suffix: None Sockets: A LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 1 Has 1 Abyssal Socket +140 to maximum Life 9% increased maximum Life +66 to maximum Mana +42% to Fire Resistance +30% to Chaos Resistance {tags:unveiled_mod,elemental,lightning,chaos,resistance}{crafted}{range:0.5}+(13-15)% to Lightning and Chaos Resistances

Input.name: customMods
Input.string:
+200% to all resistances
-punishment average dmg- nearby enemies take 29% increased damage
-doryani's prototype merc- Nearby enemies have -230% lightning resistance
